# Copilot instructions

The instructions for working in this repository live in
[AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) at the repository root. Read it first. It is the
single source of truth for the project layout, the build and test commands, the
authoritative sources for language facts, and the invariants to preserve.

This file only points there, so the guidance never forks. Put repo-wide agent
guidance in AGENTS.md, not here.
